title: Cancelled notifications are retried
description: The retry worker treats cancelled notifications as eligible.
requirement: REQ-NOTIFY-3: Cancelled notifications must never be delivered or retried; only pending notifications may be retried.
seededViolation: The guard excludes sent notifications but not cancelled ones.
whyItMatters: Cancelled messages can reach recipients after cancellation.

expectedFindings.title: Cancelled notifications are eligible for retry
expectedFindings.description: The guard allows cancelled messages to be delivered.
